attributes.action: Introduce a None of the Above option on UK election ballot papers
attributes.additional_details:
MPs on the Political and Constitutional Reform Committee wrote in its sixth report in 2015 in response to its call-for-evidence that over 70 per cent of respondents wanted a NOTA option.

Yet successive governments have failed to take into consideration the recommendations of that Committee or the overwhelming view of voters who want a NOTA option. 

We want MPs to fully consider this simple change which will encourage greater trust and participation in our democracy.
attributes.background: The Government should amend Schedule 1 of The Representation of the People (Ballot Paper) Regulations 2015 to introduce a "None of the Above" option on election ballot papers.

rejection.details:
We have a similar petition already open, which you can sign if you would like:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757966
